Off Calendar Oct-29-2024 Continued To Dec-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Obtain Possession Of Real Property And To Compel Redress Of A Breach Of The Trust
Off Calendar Oct-08-2024 Continued To Oct-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
John Orcutt, Esq., for John Depiazza, Petitioner.
Michael Abrate, Esq., for Margaret Ward, Beneficiary.

At the outset, Mr. Orcutt reports on the status of settlement discussions, advising that the parties are close to finalizing a settlement and requests a continuance to allow the parties to finalize the settlement. The court acknowledges Ms. Ebey's (counsel for Michael Dulay, Jr., Respondent) absence at today's hearing and confirms that no objections have been filed on her client's behalf by the deadline provided by the court at the previous hearing on Jul-23-2024. Accordingly, objections are deemed waived, on the record.

The subject matter is continued to Oct-29-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. Counsel is instructed to advise Ms. Ebey regarding the next hearing date.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Musto. Not Reported.

Petition To Obtain Possession Of Real Property And To Compel Redress Of A Breach Of The Trust
Off Calendar Jul-23-2024 Continued To Oct-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Orcutt and Mike Abrate appeared by zoom for John Depiazza (petitioner/trustee).
Amanda Ebey appeared by zoom for and with Michael Dulay, Jr. (respondent) by zoom.

Mrs. Ebey stated that she is hoping to be able to resolve this matter before filing an objection and that she is communicating with counsel on a path forward. Mr. Orcutt suggested a two-to-three-month continuance to work on resolution. The Petition to Obtain Possession of Real Property, etc. is continued to October 8, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If Mrs. Ebey plans to file an objection, she is to file it by September 24, 2024. If not filed by then, the objections will be deemed waived.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition To Obtain Possession Of Real Property And To Compel Redress Of A Breach Of The Trust
Off Calendar Jun-11-2024 Continued To Jul-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Orcutt and Mike Abrate appeared by zoom for John Depiazza.
Michael Dulay, Jr. appeared by zoom in propria persona.

The court stated that there is no authority for Probate Code 850 to be used in this way, that unlawful detainer actions are very specific and its own industry, and that the parties are trying to short the unlawful detainer process. Mr. Orcutt presented oral argument in response to the court's comments. The parties provided history as to circumstances that have occurred and communications that have taken place. Discussion was held regarding Mr. Dulay being in the process of obtaining a loan to pay off his sister. The court encouraged Mr. Dulay to consider getting an attorney and filing a response to the petition, and suggested mediation. The court noted that the trustee is able to file an unlawful detainer against Mr. Dulay and stated that 850 seems inapplicable. The Petition to Obtain Possession of Real Property, etc. is continued to July 23, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Dulay to respond to the petition in propria persona or with the assistance of a lawyer, and for the parties to meet and confer regarding mediation.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition To Obtain Possession Of Real Property And To Compel Redress Of A Breach Of The Trust
Off Calendar May-07-2024 Continued To Jun-11-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Abrate appeared by zoom for Margaret Ward (Petitioner).
Michael Dulay (successor trustee) in propria persona

Mr. Abrate confirmed that a copy of the trust was provided five days ago. The court informed Mr. Dulay that if the trust had not been provided, it was prepared to consider removing him. The parties presented oral argument to support their positions as to why Mr. Dulay should/should not be removed. Further discussion was held regarding circumstances that have occurred (injury/illness) which have caused delay, a prior agreement between Mr. Dulay and Mrs. Ward, prior distribution that has been provided to Mrs. Ward, a situation that occurred at Wells Fargo Bank involving Mrs. Ward, Mr. Abrate having very little faith in Mr. Dulay getting anything done, whether it is appropriate to have Mrs. Ward appointed as trustee or have a professional fiduciary appointed, Mr. Dulay's request to have until Spring or Fall of 2024 to get the house ready for sale, etc. The court noted that there is no order for removal and took the compliance status hearing under submission.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Trustee To Provide Terms Of Trust And To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Abrate appeared via zoom for Margaret Ward (Petitioner).

Mr. Arbate stated that Mr. Dualy called his office and said he would be out of town and wouldn't be able to attend today's hearing. Petition to compel trustee to provide terms to trust and remove trustee etc., is taken under submission. Compliance hearing is for November 01, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If Mr. Dulay fails to comply with the Courts order it will result in his removal of trustee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Bernardo. Not reported.
